objective: Establish implementation ordering for the state-first architecture so DAG, interfaces, and packet framing land before runtime expansion.

ordered_steps.name: north_star_workflow_dag
ordered_steps.reason: The DAG is the architecture north star and prevents drift in downstream contract work.

ordered_steps.name: state_surface_contract
ordered_steps.reason: The contract defines get_state, hydrate_state, ACP, Marimo, and substrate boundaries.

ordered_steps.name: interop_matrix
ordered_steps.reason: Interop mapping needs stable surfaces before adapter and wrapper analysis is meaningful.

ordered_steps.name: request_response_state_contract
ordered_steps.reason: The stable envelope must come after surface and interop boundaries are explicit.

ordered_steps.name: python_wrapper_binding
ordered_steps.reason: The wrapper should bind to the state contract, not invent it.

ordered_steps.name: acp_transport_binding
ordered_steps.reason: Transport should carry the state contract after the wrapper is stable.

ordered_steps.name: marimo_registry_binding
outputs: future Marimo registration and hydration binding
ordered_steps.reason: Registry behavior should depend on stable envelope and transport semantics.

ordered_steps.name: kernel_review_packet
ordered_steps.reason: Packet review should validate the architecture before implementation binding expands.
